# TradingToolsHub

> TradingToolsHub is a comprehensive directory of trading tools, platforms, brokers, and software. Compare features, pricing, and read honest reviews of 200+ trading products across 12 categories.

## Categories
- Trading Journals (15+ tools)
- Charting Platforms (12+ tools)
- Stock Screeners (10+ tools)
- US Brokers (10+ tools)
- Forex/CFD Brokers (10+ tools)
- Prop Trading Firms (10+ tools)
- Trading Education (8+ tools)
- Options Platforms (8+ tools)
- Futures Platforms (6+ tools)
- Trading Bots (6+ tools)
- Risk Management Tools (5+ tools)
- News & Data Feeds (8+ tools)

## Features
- Side-by-side tool comparisons
- Detailed pricing breakdowns
- Feature checklists
- Honest pros and cons
- Ratings and reviews
- Best-of listicles by trader type
- Alternative tool suggestions

## URL Structure
- /review/{tool-slug}/ - Individual tool reviews
- /compare/{tool-a}-vs-{tool-b}/ - Head-to-head comparisons
- /best/{category-for-audience}/ - Best-of listicles
- /alternatives/{tool-slug}/ - Alternative tools
- /pricing/{category}/ - Pricing comparisons
- /categories/{category}/ - Category listings
